notes_zh:
### 隐私与网络

- **新增**「隐私」标签页顶部的「单机模式」总开关：打开后除检查更新外不发起任何网络请求，包括链接元数据抓取、网页/图片预览加载和匿名使用统计
- **新增**「预览时执行网页脚本」开关（偏好 → 链接与预览），默认开启；关闭后预览面板中的网页将不再执行 JavaScript
- **修复** 复制大文件直链（dmg/zip/PDF/大图）时会触发完整下载的问题。链接元数据抓取改为 HEAD 预检，非 HTML 内容直接放弃，GET 流式接收硬性上限 50KB
- **修复** 关闭「网页预览」「图片链接预览」后，PasteMemo 仍会为复制的链接发起后台请求的问题（#46，感谢 @wen-long 的反馈）

### 预览

- **新增**「富文本预览」开关（偏好 → 链接与预览），默认开启；关闭后预览面板将以纯文本渲染带格式的剪贴板内容，不影响粘贴行为——粘贴出去仍带原始格式（#44，感谢 @wudys 的 PR #43）

### 设置

- **调整**「历史记录」从「偏好」标签页搬到「通用」标签页
- **调整** 链接相关的开关（链接显示原始网址、网页预览、图片链接预览、预览时执行网页脚本、富文本预览）独立成「链接与预览」分组

---
notes_en:
### Privacy & Networking

- **New** Master "Offline mode" toggle at the top of the Privacy tab — when on, PasteMemo makes no network requests beyond update checks (link metadata, web/image previews, and anonymous analytics are all suppressed)
- **New** "Run JavaScript in previews" toggle (Preferences → Links & Previews), defaulting to on; turning it off renders previewed pages without executing any JavaScript
- **Fix** Copying direct links to large binaries (dmg/zip/PDF/big images) no longer triggers a full-file download. Link metadata fetches now do a HEAD probe first, abort on non-HTML responses, and the GET path streams with a hard 50KB cap
- **Fix** Disabling "Web preview" / "Image link preview" now also stops PasteMemo from making background requests for copied links (#46, thanks @wen-long for the report)

### Preview

- **New** "Rich text preview" toggle (Preferences → Links & Previews), defaulting to on; turning it off renders rich-text clips as plain text in the preview pane while paste behavior is unchanged — the original formatting still travels with the paste (#44, thanks @wudys for the PR #43)

### Settings

- **Improve** "History" moved from the Preferences tab to the bottom of the General tab
- **Improve** Link-related toggles (raw URL, web preview, image link preview, JavaScript, rich text preview) now live in a dedicated "Links & Previews" section
